title: Basic JavaScript ES9/ES10 Features
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript ES9/ES10 Features. Focus on implementing Rest/spread for objects correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript ES9/ES10 Features
description: Create a function that uses Rest/spread for objects and Async iteration (for await...of) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript ES9/ES10 Features Project
description: Build a small application that applies Rest/spread for objects, Async iteration (for await...of), Promise.prototype.finally in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript ES9/ES10 Features
description: The following code has bugs related to Rest/spread for objects. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript ES9/ES10 Features
